evals.name: simple-add
evals.prompt: add 2 milks and bread to my cart
evals.expected_output: Searches for milk and bread, shows results with prices, adds 2 units of milk and 1 bread to cart, confirms what was added

evals.name: hebrew-mixed
evals.expected_output: Understands Hebrew, searches for yogurt/eggs/milk, adds correct quantities (3 yogurt, 1 eggs, 2 milk), confirms in a summary

evals.name: ambiguous-cheese
evals.expected_output: Searches for cheese, finds multiple types, presents options to user rather than guessing, waits for user to choose
